form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of six months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation fifth of 8 at Goodwood October 12 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Far Above Dream carrying 63.5kg at $15. When resuming last campaign second of 7 at Salon-de-Provence May 20 2024 over 1800m, soft track; 1.0 len behind Comme Quoi carrying 58kg at $5.80. Anticipating another solid first-up effort.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up ran last of 9 at Chelmsford on February 21 over 1000m, 10 len behind Atomic Force carrying 62.5kg at $7.50. form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation second last of 14 at this track February 6 over 1000m, 9 len behind Fahrenheit Seven carrying 60.5kg at $6.50. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Anticipated the start and slowly away as a result.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months 4th of 14 at this track on March 27 over 1200m, 2.25 len behind Power Fizz carrying 61kg at $34. Previously second-up won by 2.75 len at Doncaster June 28 over 1200m defeating Goyard carrying 62kg at $2.50. Fitter for that run and expected to be in the finish this time.

form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last campaign when last of 22 at Doncaster November 8 over 1200m, on rain affected going; 36 len behind Golden Mind with 56.5kg at $10. Previous preparation first-up won by 0.5 len Chelmsford October 16 over 1200m defeating Charlie Mason with 62kg at $3.30. Expect he will go well.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run 4th of 11 at Wolverhampton on March 20 over 1200m, 2.75 len behind Dark Ace carrying 59.5kg at $4.30.
